allow: PowerShell($loginBody = '{"email":"admin@hikvision.co.az","password":"Admin@123456"}' ; $loginResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5154/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $loginBody -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue ; if \($loginResp\) { $token = \($loginResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).token ; $plannerResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5154/api/schedule-planner" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue ; $data = $plannerResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json ; Write-Host "Schedules: $\($data.schedules.Count\)" ; Write-Host "Employees: $\($data.employees.Count\)" ; if \($data.schedules.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Host "First schedule: $\($data.schedules[0].name\) $\($data.schedules[0].shiftStart\)-$\($data.schedules[0].shiftEnd\)" } } else { Write-Host "Login failed" })

PowerShell($loginBody = '{"email":"admin@hikvision.co.az","password":"Admin@123456"}' ; $loginResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5154/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $loginBody -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue ; Write-Host "Status: $\($loginResp.StatusCode\)" ; $loginResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -First 3)

PowerShell($loginBody = '{"email":"admin@hikvision.co.az","password":"Admin@123456"}' ; try { $loginResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5154/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $loginBody } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" ; Write-Host "Response: $\($_.Exception.Response\)" } ; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell($loginBody = '{"email":"admin@hikvision.co.az","password":"Admin@123456"}' ; try { $loginResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5154/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $loginBody ; Write-Host "Success: $\($loginResp.StatusCode\)" ; $loginResp.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
